widgets_values:
如果有安装sage attention 就打开加速，否则会 出错。

IF you have sage attention installed. enable this speed up group.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: 0-30秒 红衣女孩在深夜的竹林里偏偏起舞，zhuanchang

blurry, oversaturated, pixelated, low resolution, grainy, distorted, noise, compression artifacts, jpeg artifacts, glitches, watermark, text, logo, signature, copyright, subtitles, distorted sound, saturated sound, loud

nodes.title: USE ONLY VOCALS 只用人声
LTX Sequencer Note 节点功能介绍
widgets_values:
节点支持以帧数（Frames）插入和按时间点(Seconds)插入。

只上传一张图片并且把权重（Strength）设置为1， 就是普通的图生视频。

把insert_frame 插帧设置为-1 就是在最后一帧插入。

或者在时间点模式，设置为视频时长的最后一秒。



Use one image at full strength for a regular image to video.

If frame_insert is -1, it will be inserted at the last frame.

The insert_mode allows switching between inserting images by setting the exact frame or by setting the exact second.

nodes.title: Model Links 模型链接
widgets_values:
checkpoints: Goes to ComfyUI/models/checkpoints folder（放这个文件夹）
https://huggingface.co/Hippotes/LTX-2.3-various-formats/blob/main/ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8mixed.safetensors


diffusion_models: Goes to ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models folder（放这个文件夹）
https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/diffusion_models/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled_transformer_only_fp8_scaled.safetensors
https://huggingface.co/Kijai/MelBandRoFormer_comfy/blob/main/MelBandRoformer_fp16.safetensors

text_encoders: Goes to ComfyUI/models/text_encoders folder（放这个文件夹）
https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/blob/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp8_scaled.safetensors
https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/text_encoders/ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors

vae: Goes to ComfyUI/models/cae folder（放这个文件夹）
https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/tree/main/vae

spatial_upscaler: Goes to ComfyUI/models/latent_upscale_models folder（放这个文件夹）
https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/blob/main/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors

loras: Goes to ComfyUI/models/loras folder（放这个文件夹）
